offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual data entry causes late order fulfillment. We automate data extraction instead of manual entry into ERP systems.
problem: Manual data entry from invoices is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Community forums for tool sharing among sellers
try_it: Let users try document scanning and data extraction on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
